flag: Keep (adopt) undo archives then session-requeues; inbox file not restored on disk
closestEquivalent: Undo archives the registry entry and re-queues a session-only seedling overlay so shell/rot/triage counts rise and the row is actionable again. Re-Keep on a session seedling unarchives via POST /api/registry/move (not adopt). Timed Discard on a session seedling drops the overlay without DELETE. Reload loses the session overlay (no reverse-adopt API / no inbox file recreation).

flag: Discard uses client soft-delete until undo window lapses
closestEquivalent: Discard immediately hides the seedling in the queue and shows the undo ribbon. DELETE /api/inbox?path=... runs only when the ~8s ribbon times out, is dismissed, or is replaced by a later discard. Undo within the window re-queues without server delete. Session-only requeues skip DELETE.

No server endpoint consolidates duplicate skills; Merge dismisses the inbox row in-session (optional AI dedupe hint / target picker). Undo re-queues within the session only; inbox file remains on disk until a later real discard commits.
Tiers remain localStorage-backed; Undo restores prior tier client-side.

flag: Deploy commit has no full reverse sync
closestEquivalent: Post-commit messaging is honest: pinned footer confirmation of rooted/pruned counts; shell/dock return to idle; no fake undo ribbon for full harness restore.
SyncReport has created/pruned/fixed (no drift field). Drift section lists dry-run fixed as corrections and supplements with status.drift names when present.

flag: Bulk Keep all suggested has no undo ribbon with session re-queue
closestEquivalent: Bulk adopt posts many items at once; ribbon undoes via multi-archive using names only (batchPaths holds names, no seedling snapshots), so session re-queue of each source path is incomplete. Individual Keep still has archive + session re-queue undo. Bulk keep is secondary.

flag: Phone settings full-sheet is CSS-fixed overlay of in-flow plate
closestEquivalent: At 390, settings plate is position:fixed from top to dock+8px rather than a separate React sheet tree; Save/Back remain in the plate header. Bottom bound leaves the thumb dock tappable.

flag: Desktop and phone garden rows both mount in DOM; CSS toggles visibility
closestEquivalent: Each skill renders desktop multi-column and phone stacked markup; max-width media query hides one. Tier segments are separate element instances per layout (makeTierSeg) so only the visible layout is interactive.

flag: Phone full surfaces bound above thumb dock (+8px gap); dock stays tappable
closestEquivalent: Iteration-3 sticky decide row sat under the fixed dock (y≈836 vs dock 784–844). Overlays/backdrops now end 8px above the dock instead of inset:0, so Keep/Merge/Discard and dock slots are both hit-testable with no overlap. Half-sheet Filter·Lens still raises sticky Apply via padding-bottom over the dock.

flag: Mode stack mutual exclusion via closeAllSurfaces / goGarden / open* toggles
where: packages/ui/src/App.tsx (closeAllSurfaces, goGarden, openTriage, openRot, openSearch, openDeployReview)
closestEquivalent: Root cause of Find→detail/Deploy flakiness: independent booleans (activeMode, deployOpen, selectedSkillName, searchOpen, filterSheetOpen) could leave multiple surfaces mounted. open* now clears siblings first; re-tapping an active dock slot returns to garden; search result sets skill only after closing search/deploy/filter.

flag: Phone triage queue capped so sticky decide row stays inside plate
closestEquivalent: Decide actions moved out of the scrolling pane into a flex-shrink:0 .triage-actions footer; queue column max-height 36% on phone so the footer cannot overflow the dock-cleared plate.

flag: Wordmark uses 44px press plate class; skill-desc two-line clamp
closestEquivalent: Wordmark visual face stays serif ~18px; min-height/min-width var(--press-min) yields measured 44px hit height. Secondary descriptions use .skill-desc (-webkit-line-clamp: 2) instead of single-line truncate.
